title: Exelon, Coalition of Power Companies Argue Before U.S. Supreme Court in Favor of Preserving EPA's Authority to Regulate Power Plant Greenhouse Gas Emissions
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #SCOTUS--Exelon argues before SCOTUS in favor of preserving the EPA's authority to set standards to limit greenhouse gas pollution from power plants.

title: Mobile Payment App Scams on the Rise, ComEd and Better Business Bureau Warn Utility Customers
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The popularity of mobile payment apps like Cash App and Venmo is giving rise to incidents of scammers using these digital networks to bilk ComEd customers out of their hard-earned money. ComEd urges customers to be aware of these new scam attempts so they identify and avoid them. In January 2022, ComEd received more than 240 reports of scams from customers, a more than 150-percent increase from January 2021. Even worse, the amount of money reported lost to successful s

title: Exelon Advocates for Low-Income Customers; Urges Congress to Increase LIHEAP Funding
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC #ProtectLIHEAP--Exelon joins NEAUC, other companies to urge Congress to fund the Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) at the highest level possible.

title: Exelon Awards $2.4 Million in Scholarships to 24 Students at Historically Black Colleges and Universities
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--Exelon has committed $2.4 million in scholarships to 24 college freshmen selected for the HBCU Corporate Scholars Program in partnership with UNCF.

title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Honeywell International, Thomson Reuters And Exelon
text: On 2/24/22, Honeywell International, Thomson Reuters, and Exelon will all trade ex-dividend for their respective upcoming dividends.

title: ComEd Encourages Illinois Students to Apply for College Scholarships of Up to $10,000 Each
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ComEd is announcing the launch of a new $250K scholarship fund to expand access to careers for minority and women in STEM.

title: ComEd Reaches Highest Levels of Reliability as Severe Weather Events Challenge Power Grids
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ComEd in 2021 delivered some of its highest levels of year-over-year reliability as a result of power grid investments such as smart switches that reroute power around potential problem areas, new storm hardening and vegetation management solutions, and cable replacement. Since grid improvements began in 2011, overall reliability has improved 68 percent. ComEd has avoided more than 17 million outages for customers, saving more than $3 billion in outage costs. Utilities

title: 4 Stocks That Wall Street Hates This Week
text: Wall Street analysts are constantly releasing and updating reports on stocks across their respective coverage universes.

title: Local Civic Leaders Zaldwaynaka “Z” Scott and Smita Shah Named to ComEd Board of Directors
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ComEd today announced the appointments of Zaldwaynaka "Z" Scott, 63, president of Chicago State University, and Smita Shah, 48, CEO of SPAAN Tech, Inc., to its board as independent directors. They join Metropolitan Family Services President and CEO Ricardo “Ric” Estrada, who was named to the board in November 2021. “Z and Smita are distinguished business and civic leaders from our community and have proven track records of innovation and leadership experience. We are p

title: Exelon Announces Retirement of Board of Directors Chairman Mayo A. Shattuck III
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--Exelon Corp. (Nasdaq: EXC) today announced the retirement of Mayo A. Shattuck III, chair of the company's board of directors since 2012.

title: Exelon Completes Spin-Off Of Constellation Energy
text: On February 23, 2021, Exelon Corporation had announced a tax-free spinoff of its generation business unit into a new, independent publicly-traded company named Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG).

title: Exelon Drops 30% - Why Stock Market Tickers Aren't Always Accurate
text: Exelon Drops 30% - Why Stock Market Tickers Aren't Always Accurate

title: CEG Stock Alert: Constellation Energy Pops After Exelon (EXC) Stock Spinoff
text: Constellation Energy is officially its own company. The spinoff is going well for CEG stock so far as demand for natural gas solutions rises.

title: Exelon down 30% after completing the separation of Constellation Energy
text: Exelon Corp. (NASDAQ: EXC) plummets 30% after it announced the completion of the separation of Constellation. Constellation Energy Corporation is the company's former competitive energy and power generation business.

title: Wednesday Morning's 5 Tech Stock Movers Include Alphabet, AMD and PayPal
text: Tech stocks got off to a strong start Wednesday morning. The Nasdaq was up about 1.5%, while the Dow Jones industrials were up about 1.0% and the S&P 500 traded up by around 1.2%.

title: Constellation Launches as Largest U.S. Clean Energy Company After Completing Separation From Exelon
text: BALTIMORE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Constellation (Nasdaq: CEG) today announced the completion of its separation from Exelon Corp. (Nasdaq: EXC) and its launch as a standalone, publicly traded company and the nation's largest carbon-free energy producer and leading supplier of clean energy solutions to millions of homes and businesses. title: Exelon Completes Separation of Constellation, Moving Forward as Nation's Premier Transmission and Distribution Utility Company
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Exelon Corp. (Nasdaq: EXC) today announced it has completed the separation of Constellation Energy Corp.
